ddls:
CREATE TABLE "memory_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each memory region */,
  "address_range" TEXT /* Address range of the memory region */,
  "memory_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of memory */,
  "shareability_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shareability characteristic */,
  "cache_policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cache policy applied */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the memory region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the memory region */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the memory region (e.g., active, inactive, deprecated) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the memory region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_regions_memory_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("memory_type_id") REFERENCES memory_types ("memory_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_regions_cache_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("cache_policy_id") REFERENCES cache_policies ("cache_policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_regions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_regions_shareability_id FOREIGN KEY ("shareability_id") REFERENCES shareability ("shareability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "memory_types" (
  "memory_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each memory type */,
  "memory_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the memory type (e.g., Normal, Device) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description explaining the characteristics of the memory type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the memory type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the memory type */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the memory type is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("memory_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shareability" (
  "shareability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shareability type */,
  "shareability_name" TEXT /* Name of the shareability type (e.g., Non-shareable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description explaining the shareability model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the shareability type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the shareability type */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the shareability type is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shareability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cache_policies" (
  "cache_policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cache policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the cache policy (e.g., WT, WBWA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description explaining the caching behavior */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the cache policy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the cache policy */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cache policy is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cache_policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "memory_usage_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the memory region being logged */,
  "usage_amount" REAL /* Amount of memory used (in bytes) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the log entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_usage_logs_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES memory_regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_usage_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_usage_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the device was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the device */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the device is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the configuration */,
  "configuration_data" TEXT /* JSON or text data containing the configuration details */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the configuration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configurations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configurations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the user for the specific device (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
